name: FORGE
subtitle: Plumbing · Heating · Electrical
tagline: Same-day response. No call-out fee. 20 years of trusted service across West Yorkshire.
street: Unit 12, Wellington Industrial Estate, Leeds LS12 2UA
registeredAddress: Unit 12, Wellington Industrial Estate, Leeds LS12 2UA, United Kingdom

services.name: Emergency Repairs
services.desc: Burst pipes, gas leaks, no heating — we arrive within 60 minutes. Available 24/7, 365 days a year.

services.name: Boiler Installation & Service
services.desc: Full boiler replacement, annual servicing, and landlord safety certificates. All work Gas Safe certified.

services.name: Bathroom Fitting
services.desc: Complete bathroom renovations — plumbing, tiling, installation. Free design consultation included.

services.name: Central Heating
services.desc: Radiator installation, power flushing, underfloor heating, and smart thermostat upgrades.

services.name: Drainage & Blockages
services.desc: High-pressure jetting, CCTV drain surveys, and root removal. No-dig solutions where possible.

services.name: Landlord Services
services.desc: Gas safety certificates (CP12), EICR electrical reports, and planned maintenance for rental properties.

about.title: Three generations of getting it right.
paragraphs: FORGE started in 2005 when Dave Thompson left the corporate plumbing world to serve his local community. What began as a single van and a reputation for showing up on time has grown into West Yorkshire's most trusted trades team.
We don't do call-out fees. We don't do hidden charges. We do clear quotes, clean work, and a 12-month guarantee on every job — no exceptions.
Every engineer on our team is fully qualified, background-checked, and trained to explain the work in plain English. No jargon, no upsells, no surprises.

whyChoose.text: 60-minute emergency response — we aim to arrive faster than anyone else in West Yorkshire
12-month guarantee on all workmanship — if something isn't right, we come back free of charge
Fully insured and accredited — Gas Safe, NICEIC, Which? Trusted Trader, CHAS
480+ five-star reviews — check our Google profile and see what our customers say

reviews.name: Sarah Mitchell
reviews.text: Had a burst pipe at 2am on a Sunday. FORGE arrived in 40 minutes and had it sorted by 3:30. Absolute lifesavers.

reviews.name: Tom Bradley
reviews.text: New boiler installed last month. The engineer was clean, professional, and explained everything. Best price out of 4 quotes too.

reviews.name: The Nguyens
reviews.text: Used FORGE for our bathroom renovation. They handled everything — plumbing, tiling, electrics. One point of contact, zero stress.
